name: codemap
description: 96-action codebase analysis — native Rust tree-sitter AST across 15 languages (TS/JS/TSX/JSX/Python/Rust/Go/Java/Ruby/PHP/C/C++/Bash/Lua/Kotlin/SQL), function-level call graphs, PageRank/HITS/bridges/clusters, CPG data-flow + taint + slicing, PE/ELF/Mach-O/Java/WASM binary RE, .NET/DBF/Clarion/SQL schema parsing, web-app blueprinting, LSP integration, ML model files (GGUF/SafeTensors/ONNX/CUDA/pyc), and composite CI checks.
